title: ESIC Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 19 Specialist, Senior Resident Posts
description: The Employee State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 19 Specialist, Super Specialist, and Senior Resident posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS, DNB, Post-graduation, PGDM, or MBBS can apply for the ESIC Notification 2026 . Interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
